scripts.build:nodes: tsx scripts/1-fetch-packages.ts && tsx scripts/2-parse-nodes.ts && tsx scripts/3-parse-docs.ts && tsx scripts/4-build-db.ts
scripts.build:nodes:official: tsx scripts/1-fetch-packages.ts --official-only && tsx scripts/2-parse-nodes.ts && tsx scripts/3-parse-docs.ts && tsx scripts/4-build-db.ts
scripts.build:knowledge: npm run build:nodes:official && npm run fetch:templates && npm run build:templates && npm run emit:stats && npm run verify:knowledge
scripts.build:db: npm run build:nodes && npm run emit:stats
scripts.build:db:with-external: tsx scripts/1-fetch-packages.ts && tsx scripts/2-parse-nodes.ts && tsx scripts/3-parse-docs.ts && tsx scripts/4-build-db.ts && tsx scripts/7-import-external-candidates.ts && tsx scripts/8-verify-external-nodes.ts && tsx scripts/6-emit-stats.ts
